creator: meetshamsher@gmail.com
text:
Hi,
Observing mrsas continuous print in console/dmesg for FreeBSD-13:

mrsas0: Cannot build MPT-MFI passthru cmd.
mrsas0: Cannot build MPT cmd.
mrsas0: Cannot issue DCMD internal command.

Below are the default settings:
sysctl hw.mfi
hw.mfi.fw_reset_test: 0
hw.mfi.mrsas_enable: 0
hw.mfi.msi: 1
hw.mfi.cmd_timeout: 30
hw.mfi.polled_cmd_timeout: 60
hw.mfi.detect_jbod_change: 1
hw.mfi.max_cmds: 128
hw.mfi.event_class: -2
hw.mfi.event_locale: 65535

Below are the dmesg log:
] dmesg
mrsas0: Cannot build MPT-MFI passthru cmd.
mrsas0: Cannot build MPT cmd.
mrsas0: Cannot issue DCMD internal command.
mrsas0: Cannot build MPT-MFI passthru cmd.
mrsas0: Cannot build MPT cmd.
mrsas0: Cannot issue DCMD internal command.
